here are 5 teams you can make that will clear alert 2:

* tawil ramona karen caecus (mouse's wisdom)

* mouchette thais aigis faint (from the mist realm)

* gmurphy tulu faros murphy (wayward ship)

* gdoll lily nymphaea agrippa (plague of illusions)

* alva ogier doll + whale kath support (undying sun)

ch7 hard: use R wheels, stand in red pools, have enough sustain for the last boss. Example team: Corposant Tulu Thais Aigis with Encounter in Pure White posse. Put birthing orison on both corpo cards

d-tide teams

- gmurphy tulu faros goliath (wayward ship)

- corpo aurita clem murphy (encounter in pure white)

- tawil hameln celeste caecus (a mouse's wisdom)

- castor jenkin erica winkle (derision of destiny)

- lotan thais aigis faint (the lone seed)

- sanga gdoll nautila nymphaea (plague of illusions) - this is for waves where you can just stall and get poison or counter from the relic

- ramona karen horla + whale kath support (undying sun)

My team would be Lily / Pollux / Castor / Jenkin
lets talk about E3
Or maybe that’s too much hmm
so, the first pollux card played got its def, damage and aliemus boosted
sometimes you can take advantage of that to shield big
or to delete a mob
after that, your next source of big damage is your hearts
after playing 3 times the same heart, it gets exhausted and the next pollux card gets played twice
so a combo to delete something would be: heart -> pollux posse -> heart -> castor plume -> heart -> double play 3 cost which gets discounted to 0
if you are dealing with multiple low health mobs, you can double play the 2 cost instead
